# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.UserAttenuationCurve property

Custom attenuation curve used when UserDefined is selected.

X Axis: Normalized distance `0` = inner, `1` = outer.

Y Axis: Volume `1` = full, `0` = silent.

```csharp
public Curve UserAttenuationCurve { get; set; }
```
